description: CompositionWhite kurta with print, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with pink piping, buttoned chest placket, pleated and pintucked at the back neck, has an antebellum waistline, short sleeves, has an assymetrical curved hem and split hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this printed kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose green kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
